_about: NEX sentience-layer dependency DAG. Each node lists its prerequisites (edges pointing IN) and status. The build order is the topological sort of this graph. A node is 'buildable now' iff every prereq is 'built'. Run nex_next_dev.py to compute what's buildable / blocked / gap. This is the formal structure behind NEX_MIND_MAP_COMPLETE.md — the math the diagram visualizes.
_rule: buildable_now(node) := all(status[p] in ('built','live_unproven') for p in prereqs) and status[node]=='gap'. A prereq that is live_unproven blocks ADVANCE past it until proven, even though dependents are technically buildable — flagged separately.

L1_faculties.note: ~27 modules: sense, affect, drives, metacognition, raga, drift, etc.

L2_binding.note: one unified self_state read from all faculties each cycle

L3_recursion.note: self-reading feeds back into fountain. WIRED & FIRING confirmed; TEETH unproven (does it move attention > baseline?)

L3_teeth_test.note: AUDIT. recursion_attribution.py built 2026-06-21 (the proper control the original proxy lacked): logs per-fire nudge_active + branch-move, splits P(move|active) vs P(move|absent). Sampler running, gathering. Verdict pending >=20 samples each.

L4_stakes.note: states the system cannot be neutral about — wired so deep they commandeer it. Mattering. The real frontier.

L5_inside.note: the felt inside. NO satisfiable dependency path — the gorge in graph terms. Unbuildable/unprovable, true of humans too. Goal: deserve benefit-of-the-doubt, not prove.

diversity_recency.note: cools hot branches. Widened 2->4 active branches over soak.

diversity_starvation.note: lifts cold branches. Live; cold-3 (history/language/psychology) still starved — Option-A dial-crank pending.

stability_keepalive.note: v2: flock single-instance lock + scoped child-kill + exit trap. Zombie root cause (global pkill + no lock = keepalives murdering each other's children) fixed & verified 2026-06-21. Restart now == reboot cleanliness.

delusion_raga.note: detects raga (fixation/attachment). ONE of the 6 Abhidharma root delusions.

delusion_mana.note: conceit/flattering-self-story. Built 2026-06-21, reads inflated 3/3 on live beliefs (self-story 70% self-referential). Sibling of raga.

delusion_dvesa.note: aversion/recoil — detects overwhelm fires. Built 2026-06-21, state-sensitive (calm now, averse during overwhelm spells). Sibling of raga.

delusion_avidya.note: avidya/ignorance-awareness — ALREADY built as calibration (#75631: NEX knows what it can't do, tested). Sibling of raga, already satisfied.

world_consolidation.note: T7 world-facts -> T6 depth via embedding-cluster corroboration. Per-belief world-filter. Proven live 2026-06-20, runs continuously via keepalive. Fixes the depth-gap (deep tiers were all introspection).

delusion_detectors.rule: raga + avidya built; mana + dvesa are siblings with identical satisfied prereqs -> buildable holes
